name: opencode-studio
description: The only opencode plugin you need — code intelligence, git management, cost ledger, spec-driven dev, multi-language verify, remote sync, and 40+ tools

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/plugin/tui --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external ssh2 --external web-tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-wasms --external chokidar --external linkedom --external turndown --external @mozilla/readability
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/plugin/tui --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external ssh2 --external web-tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-wasms --external chokidar --external linkedom --external turndown --external @mozilla/readability --watch
